subject: Particles falling under DESELECTED category
body:
Hi Warpers,
I am trying to pick particles from my recent Krios collection. To my 
knowledge, I am using the right gain reference file. I flipped the gain 
reference .mrc file in Y-axis, yet particles fall under DESELECTED category 
and appears grey (Image attached). 
My dataset has 7000 tif files. I selected a random 40 tif files, moved to a 
separate folder along with the reference folder and flipped the reference 
file in X-axis. Fortunately, it works meaning Warp is picking up my 
particles and now they fall under PROCESSED category and appears green. 
However, when I do the same for the entire dataset of 7000 files, it FAILS 
AGAIN. 
I am new to Warp, and I am unable to move ahead from here. 
Any suggestions/advise in this regard will be highly appreciated!
Thanks,
Abhipsa 
BioChemistry PhD student 
City University of New York
